{{Infobox location
| name = Greatfather
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[The Greatfather]] is a mountain.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Greatfather]] is a mountain to the south of [[Sacred Valley]] with a shattered peak resembling a bottle mouth.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] stands beneath the [[Greatfather]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
